title: Pydantic Configuration-Driven Architecture
subtitle: Config-Driven Architecture
description: Uses Pydantic models to define complete configuration trees, supporting JSON file loading, environment variable overrides, and multi-path discovery. All system behavior is driven by declarative configuration rather than hardcoded values.
best_practices: Define strongly-typed configurations using Pydantic BaseModel with automatic validation and documentation
Support camelCase aliases for frontend JSON format compatibility
